generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.omg.org/techprocess/ab/OML"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/dtdf/vocab#"

instance SafetyComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating whether system is within safety temperature limits"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating optimal operational parameters for temperature regulation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating detected sensor or actuator failure"
]

instance TemperatureDynamicsPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from predictive simulation of temperature dynamics"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful model calibration based on sensor data"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts heatbed power to maintain target temperature",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts fan speed for air circulation control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating thermal models using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for identifying sensor or actuator failures",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting temperature dynamics under varying operational scenarios",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureDynamicsPredictionInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing heatbed and fan control to maintain target temperatures",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbedAction, AdjustFanAction
]

instance ThermalMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of thermal conditions through sensor data analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyComplianceInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating thermal model parameters using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting sensor or actuator failures",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine for simulating temperature dynamics under varying operational scenarios",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine for optimizing heatbed and fan control to maintain target temperatures",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlOptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine for real-time monitoring of thermal conditions through sensor data analysis",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalMonitoringService
]

instance ThermalModelTwoParameter : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical thermal simulation model with two free parameters",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, PredictiveSimulationEngine
]

instance ThermalModelFourParameter : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical thermal simulation model with four free parameters, better predicts heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, PredictiveSimulationEngine
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary thermal actuator for heating the incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation actuator for temperature regulation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based controller unit for system management"
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor within the styrofoam box",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor1Data
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor within the styrofoam box",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor2Data
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor outside the styrofoam box",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempSensorData
]

instance InternalTempSensor1Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTempSensor2Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTempSensor1DataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from internal sensor 1",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor1Data,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, PredictiveSimulationEngine, ControlOptimizationEngine, MonitoringEngine
]

instance InternalTempSensor2DataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from internal sensor 2",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor2Data,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, PredictiveSimulationEngine, ControlOptimizationEngine, MonitoringEngine
]

instance ExternalTempSensorDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from external sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempSensorData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, PredictiveSimulationEngine, ControlOptimizationEngine, MonitoringEngine
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam-insulated incubator system for precise temperature regulation",
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan are sent by the Raspberry Pi controller to regulate temperature; however, command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not specified in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update cyber-physical system models with sensor-derived parameter estimates, which inform monitoring components for safety and optimality checks, with human or algorithmic decision-making for physical twin modifications when violations are detected, as depicted in Figure 1 of Document 1."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through experimental comparison of simulation predictions against physical data, with the four-parameter thermal model demonstrating superior accuracy in predicting heatbed thermal inertia. Calibration algorithms continuously adjust model parameters using sensor data to minimize discrepancies and ensure alignment with the physical twin."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on Raspberry Pi single-board computer; computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, deployment models, and availability/reliability assurances are not detailed in the provided documents."
]
